descriptionParagraphs: Add up the paddle power and speed of a big ThickLizzy, the walkability of a wide-nosed longboard and the super ball-bearing feel of a v.Bowls and the BigPin is the outcome — a nose-ridable, planing glider feel.

Flat and wide across the deck makes the paddle speed great but not at the expense of making the board unresponsive on-rail. A really healthy spiral vee in the back half of the board keeps this shape extremely loose and smooth off the back half while maintaining a lot of speed.

Down-rails all the way around for trim speed on flat sections and less-powerful waves, coupled with the triplane of the Lizzy for efficiency onto rail — the BigPin is a mashup of a ton of my favorite details, all focused around effortless speed and fun on days.
